name: Vince Giordano
abstract: Vince Giordano (born March 11, 1952) is an American saxophonist and leader of the New York-based Nighthawks Orchestra. He specializes in jazz of the 1920s and 1930s and his primary instrument is the bass saxophone.

interviews.title: Vince Giordano interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 11, 2007

about_quotes.evidence: Jon has performed with Jim Dapogny’s Chicago Jazz Band and Vince Giordano’s Night Hawks.

about_quotes.speaker: Daryl Sherman
about_quotes.evidence: They’ve been playing regularly with Vince Giordano and the Nighthawks... And I love just the three of us... And we’ll be at Mezzrow on the 18th
about_quotes.doc_title: Daryl Sherman interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, June 11, 2024

about_quotes.speaker: Bob Haggart
about_quotes.evidence: There’s a guy today that, Vince Giordano, who plays the bass sax... I know he’s thinking of chucking the whole thing.

about_quotes.speaker: Chuck Mancuso
about_quotes.evidence: I do Vince Giordano replicating it a hundred years later and everything.
